channel.title: Server-Monitoring on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Server-Monitoring on Pi Stack

item.title: Beszel 2026: Complete Guide to Lightweight Self-Hosted Server Monitoring
item.description: Monitoring your servers is essential, but the most popular solutions — Prometheus + Grafana, Zabbix, Nagios — require significant infrastructure and expertise to set up. Beszel is a lightweight, self-hosted server monitoring tool that delivers historical metrics, Docker container stats, and alerting in a single, easy-to-deploy package.
